## Review checklist

- [ ] The change is one reviewable work unit.
- [ ] Tests or contracts cover changed behavior where applicable.
- [ ] Documentation reflects current implemented behavior.
- [ ] Validation claims above are backed by command output.
- [ ] Logs, fixtures, and screenshots contain no secrets.
